title: massaman mellow australian pork curry
description: a citrusy, paleo-friendly massaman curry made with australian pork, featuring a glassy-jelly sauce.
instructions: In a large pan, heat 2 tablespoons of coconut oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the sliced shallots and cook for a further 2 minutes until softened.
Add the massaman curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the pork shoulder and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2 hours or until the pork is tender.
Remove the pork from the pan and shred it into bite-sized pieces.
Return the pork to the pan and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for a further 10 minutes to thicken the sauce.
Serve the curry over steamed rice or noodles.
